title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Muhammad Farooq presents five critical components required in an AI agent harness to move beyond demos to production systems. The harness is positioned as the operational layer that converts model predictions into completed tasks, distinct from the model itself.
writeup: Muhammad Farooq outlines five components an AI agent harness needs to move from demos to production systems. The framing separates the model from the harness, defined as the operational layer that converts model predictions into completed tasks. The takeaway is a checklist for production-grade agents, with attention to multi-agent systems and model evaluation.
